name.en: Off-Field DPS & Buff and Heal Support

notes.en: [[character:linnea]] is a potent support for [[element:geo]] units, providing Off-Field Damage with her companion Lumi, [[element:lunar-crystallize]] DMG when Moondrifts are present, and also providing [[element:geo]] Resistance shredding and teamwide healing. In addition, when Ascendant Gleam is active, Lumi can also boost the team's [[stat:em]], and further amplifies the [[element:geo]] Resistance shredding.
[[character:linnea]] can feed Lumi into her Ultimate Power form to execute the Million Ton Crush, a huge [[element:lunar-crystallize]] DMG nuke.

After inputting {rot:[1E]}, Lumi will continuously deal [[element:lunar-crystallize]] and [[element:geo]] DMG. Inputting {rot:[4E]} will lead to Lumi dealing all of her [[element:lunar-crystallize]] DMG via the Million Ton Crush, after which she will only deal continuous [[element:geo]] DMG.
Both modes yield pretty similar damage, however using {rot:[1E]} is generally more advisable in most teams.
